content: Comparative evaluations of curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM vs RND) can be reframed as a curious agent actively sampling which exploration intrinsic reward design to test next, using its 2024–2025 SOTA structured memory to store how each method performs across sparse-reward environments. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent learns to optimize the choice of curiosity mechanism itself, rather than having researchers fix it pre-training.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
